prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Three stars. The experience of waking up was largely as described—eyes opened, body shifted, mild disorientation gave way to general awareness. The transition from unconsciousness to consciousness occurred smoothly, though with some noted grogginess and reluctance. Sunlight filtration through the blinds was adequate, but not exceptional, and ambient sounds (birds, minor traffic) were present yet tolerable. Overall, waking up performed its essential function but lacked any notable features or sense of novelty. Would use again, though the experience remains inconsistent depending on preceding conditions.
